description: Senior Project Manager with extensive EPC/EPCM experience in energy, oil & gas, and power sectors.

projects.project: Medco DFO (Dayung Facility Optimization) Project, Grisik, Jambi
projects.client: PT. Medco Exploration and Production Grisik Ltd (MEPG)
projects.project_description: The Medco DFO (Dayung Facility Optimization) Project in Grisik, Jambi involves the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of facility optimizations to enhance production efficiency for PT. Medco Exploration and Production Grisik Ltd.
projects.responsibilities: Develop Project Management / Construction Plan and Project Charter; Plan and coordinate all project phases (HSE, Quality, Cost, Engineering, Fabrication, Construction, Commissioning); Manage interfaces with stakeholders, subcontractors, and clients; Ensure quality, safety, and cost control; Supervise site and construction managers; Prepare performance and status reports for upper management; Manage project scope, schedule, and budget changes.

projects.project: CAP2 PROJECT (Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant-2), Purwakarta, West Java
projects.project_description: The CAP2 Project focuses on the Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management (EPCM) of a Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant-2 located in Purwakarta, West Java, for PT. Lenzing South Pacific Viscose.
projects.responsibilities: Provide safety, quality, and overall project leadership; Develop EPC management plans; Supervise design engineering, procurement, and construction activities; Monitor and mitigate risks; Provide accurate reporting of project metrics; Act as the primary point of contact for the Owner and stakeholders; Manage schedule adherence, cost control, and change management; Organize team-building sessions.

projects.project: Emily 1 Project Fuel Terminal and Jetty, Balikpapan
projects.project_description: The Emily 1 Project involves the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of a Fuel Terminal and Jetty facility in Balikpapan to support Exxon Mobil Ltd's logistics and distribution operations.
projects.responsibilities: Develop Project Management and Construction Plans; Coordinate all project phase activities; Manage interface between functional groups, partners, and subcontractors; Ensure safety, quality, and cost control; Supervise site management; Formulate performance reports regarding progress and costs; Assist in defining project scope and technical feasibility; Manage changes to scope, schedule, and costs.

projects.project: EPCIC Arung Nowera Gas Production Development Facilities
projects.project_description: This project involved the preparation and development of a comprehensive EPCC (Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning) proposal for the Arung Nowera Gas Production Development Facilities.
projects.responsibilities: Develop proposal organization charts and roles; Lead the proposal team in developing technical and commercial documents; Assess technical engineering designs and construction methods; Review tender documents including Instruction to Bidders and Scope of Work; Coordinate bid kick-off and progress meetings; Ensure bid development aligns with Capture Plan strategies.

projects.project_description: Development of a comprehensive EPCC proposal for the Carbon Disulfide (CS2) Adsorption Plant (CAP2) for PT. South Pacific Viscose, focusing on technical feasibility and commercial viability.
projects.responsibilities: Develop proposal organization chart and roles; Lead proposal team in technical and commercial development; Assess technical engineering designs; Review construction plans and constructability methods; Review tender documents and Instruction to Bidders; Coordinate bid kick-off meetings; Ensure alignment with Capture plan; Monitor bidding progress.

projects.project: New Business Development - Power Plant Refurbishment and O&M Contract
projects.project_description: Strategic business development and proposal management for power plant refurbishment and Operation & Maintenance (O&M) contracts specifically targeting PLN and its subsidiaries.
projects.responsibilities: Lead business development agendas to meet target objectives; Collaborate on new service opportunities; Manage proposal administration evaluations; Drive growth within the BD Department; Identify and develop energy sector clients; Input to corporate strategic marketing plans; Maintain relationships with government, regulators, and professional organizations.

projects.project: Provision of Pre-FEED Services for In-Field Flowlines and Export Pipelines in PNG
projects.project_description: Management of Pre-Front End Engineering Design (Pre-FEED) services for midstream infrastructure, including flowlines and export pipelines in Papua New Guinea for Horizon Oil.
projects.responsibilities: Manage technical support for Pre-FEED engineering; Coordinate multi-discipline teams and field expertise; Maintain client relationships and major correspondence; Review constructability, procurement, and logistics strategies; Conduct consortium and client meetings; Prepare final project closing reports.

projects.project_description: Oversight of complex logistics and material management for the major expansion of the Tangguh LNG facility (Train 3) in West Papua, involving large-scale marine operations.
projects.responsibilities: Lead logistics, marine operations, and material management execution; Prepare project-specific logistics plans and systems; Set up Marshaling Yards at Cilegon and Gresik; Monitor logistics KPIs; Ensure alignment with CSTS plans and prepare mitigation strategies; Oversee overseas and domestic shipments and customs processes.

projects.role: Deputy Project Manager / Site Manager - TSC (Tripatra and Samsung Consortium)
projects.project_description: EPCC execution for the Senoro Gas Development Project as part of the Tripatra and Samsung Consortium, focusing on upstream gas processing facilities.
projects.responsibilities: Develop Project Management and Construction Plans; Coordinate activities through all project phases; Manage consortium interfaces and subcontractor relationships; Ensure quality, safety, progress, and cost control; Resolve site work procedures and construction problems; Supervise workers through site and construction managers; Formulate performance reports.

projects.project_description: The South Sumatra NGL Project involved the Engineering, Procurement, Construction and Commissioning (EPCC) of Natural Gas Liquid facilities to optimize resource extraction and processing for PT. Perta Samtan Gas.
projects.responsibilities: Develop Project Management, Procurement, and Risk Management Plans; Manage project scope and change control; Monitor progress and performance; Liaise with project board and senior management; Lead multidiscipline engineering and construction teams; Coordinate commissioning and pre-startup activities; Ensure compliance with legal and accounting functions.

projects.project: Tendering Resid Fluid Catalytic Cracking (RFCC) Project, RU 3 Cilacap
projects.project_description: Leadership of the EPCC proposal development for the Resid Fluid Catalytic Cracking (RFCC) unit at Pertamina's RU 3 Cilacap refinery, focusing on technical and contractual compliance.
projects.responsibilities: Lead team to achieve proposal targets per RFP requirements; Coordinate with Contracts for prime contract review; Execute cross-functional planning with Finance, Legal, and Engineering; Direct the Preliminary Project Execution Plan (PPEP); Present proposal summaries to senior management; Maintain client contact and monitor contractual commitments; Review procurement and logistics strategies.

projects.company: PT. ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.role: Business Operation Manager / Deputy General Manager
projects.project_description: Strategic management of the Boiler and Environmental Service Business (BESB), overseeing tendering, field service groups, and business operation activities for power plant services.
projects.responsibilities: Direct boiler operations and BESB performance; Manage tendering, sales support, and project execution; Implement and monitor business operation improvements; Control annual operation budgets; Coordinate internal communications across departments; Develop and improve KPI standards; Provide leadership and direction to subordinates.

projects.company: PT. ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.project_description: Management of multiple contract activities covering the full lifecycle of power plant projects, including engineering, procurement, fabrication, and start-up phases.
projects.responsibilities: Coordinate contract activities through all phases; Direct maintenance contract teams; Review contract documents for consistency; Approve expenditures for materials and services; Manage contract changes and price requests; Approve manufacturing and construction schedules; Maintain customer relationships and lead negotiations; Assign project managers to specific contracts.

projects.company: PT. ABB ALSTOM POWER ENERGY SYSTEM INDONESIA
projects.project_description: End-to-end project coordination for power sector contracts, ensuring technical and commercial alignment from the engineering phase through to final commissioning.
projects.responsibilities: Provide overall project coordination from engineering to commissioning; Review contract documents for technical and commercial consistency; Approve all contract expenditures; Manage contract change requests; Ensure schedule consistency with contract requirements; Approve on-site corrective and preventive actions; Issue periodic status reports.
